DOCUMENT TITLE: Single-Use Flow Path Technical Dossier
COMPANY: Northbridge BioSystems
DOCUMENT CODE: NBX-QA-4407
PRODUCT FAMILY: NFlow XR sterile transfer manifold
LOT: NXR-26-0418
REVISION: D
MANUFACTURING SITE: Wexford, Ireland
DOCUMENT STATUS: SYNTHETIC TEST DATA | Not for regulatory or commercial use

PAGE 1

HEADER
Northbridge BioSystems
SYNTHETIC TEST DATA | NBX-QA-4407 | Not for regulatory or commercial use

TITLE
Single-Use Flow Path Technical Dossier

SUBTITLE
Gamma-compatible bioprocess assembly | Revision D

PRODUCT INFORMATION
Product family: NFlow XR sterile transfer manifold
Lot: NXR-26-0418
Manufacturing site: Wexford, Ireland

SECTION: 1. Design Qualification Summary
The NFlow XR assembly is a preconfigured fluid-transfer path comprising platinum-cured silicone tubing, polycarbonate junction manifolds, fluoropolymer vent filters, and overmolded thermoplastic elastomer transitions. Design verification addressed extractables risk, pressure-hold integrity, occlusion resistance, connector torque retention, and post-irradiation embrittlement.

TABLE: Critical Attributes
Critical attribute | Verification method | Acceptance criterion | Observed result
Pressure decay | 30 min at 0.45 MPa | <=0.8 kPa | 0.3 kPa
Burst pressure | Hydrostatic ramp | >=0.90 MPa | 1.24 MPa
Particulate burden | USP <788> adapted | Internal alert level | Below alert
Gamma dose mapping | ISO 11137-3 | 25-40 kGy | 31.6 kGy

SECTION: 2. Materials of Construction
TABLE: Materials of Construction
Component | Polymer / grade | Compendial or regulatory basis
Pump segment | Platinum-cured silicone | USP Class VI; ISO 10993-5
Manifold body | Medical-grade polycarbonate | 21 CFR 177.1580
Vent membrane | Hydrophobic PTFE | Bacterial retention validated
Clamp body | Polyoxymethylene copolymer | Engineering drawing NBX-CLP-88

Supplier-change notification is required 120 days before implementation for resin formulation, catalyst package, irradiation site, molding tool, or sterilization load configuration changes.

PAGE 2

HEADER
Northbridge BioSystems
SYNTHETIC TEST DATA | NBX-QA-4407 | Not for regulatory or commercial use

SECTION: Release Specification and Process Capability
Batch release integrates device-history-record reconciliation, line-clearance verification, calibrated test-equipment status, and electronic review of critical process parameters. Statistical trending is performed using normalized defect rates and process-capability indices.

TABLE: Release Tests
Release test | Method reference | Lower limit | Upper limit | Typical
Flow coefficient | NBX-TM-114 | 1.85 L/min | 2.35 L/min | 2.12 L/min
Clamp force | ASTM D790 adapted | 38 N | 62 N | 49 N
Seal strength | ASTM F88 | 18 N/15 mm | Not applicable | 26 N/15 mm
Endotoxin | USP <85> | Not applicable | 0.25 EU/device | <0.05 EU/device

SECTION: Sterilization and Aging Model
Accelerated aging was modeled using an Arrhenius relationship with Q10 = 2.0. Functional equivalence was confirmed after a simulated 36-month shelf-life interval, followed by transportation conditioning under ASTM D4169 distribution cycle 13. Package-integrity verification used dye penetration, bubble emission, and vacuum-decay methods.

TABLE: Sterilization and Aging Results
Condition | Pre-aging | Post-aging | Acceptance
Tensile retention | 100% | 96.8% | >=90%
Leak test pass rate | 60/60 | 60/60 | 60/60
Visual anomaly rate | 0.0% | 1.7% | <=5.0%

PAGE 3 - IMAGE-ONLY OCR PAGE

PAGE HEADER OUTSIDE IMAGE
Northbridge BioSystems
SYNTHETIC TEST DATA | NBX-QA-4407 | Not for regulatory or commercial use

TEXT INSIDE IMAGE
INCOMING COMPONENT INSPECTION

Visual and Dimensional Verification
The molded polycarbonate manifold was examined under 500 lux illumination for gate vestige, particulate inclusions, stress whitening, sink marks, and flow-line discontinuity.

Critical dimensions were measured using a calibrated optical comparator. Sampling followed ANSI/ASQ Z1.4, General Inspection Level II, AQL 0.65.

Disposition
All critical-to-quality attributes conformed to drawing NBX-MFD-217 Rev. E. No nonconforming material report was initiated.

TABLE INSIDE IMAGE: Incoming Inspection
Attribute | Method | Acceptance | Result
Port concentricity | Optical comparator | <=0.20 mm | 0.08 mm
Luer taper | ISO 594 gauge | Pass | Pass
Bioburden | Membrane filtration | <=10 CFU/device | 2 CFU/device

IMAGE FOOTER
Synthetic test record - Image-only OCR page
